calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Hedemark for and with (petitioner) Aaron Srzentich.

The Court stated that there is an issue with procedure relying on 103450 of the Health & Safety code, that it is set up for different circumstances, cited 12400 and that it does not sound like there is any estate in California to probate. Ms. Hedemark stated that there is no estate in California, that there is property in Europe and that the authorities there advised that he needs a death certificate. The Court stated that it understands the issues and asked if the other location did not have probate set up. Mr. Srzentich stated that it has to be the place that the person was last seen. The Court stated that it cannot issue a death certificate under this code. Ms. Hedemark stated that they will possibly file for probate but that she is not sure that it will work. The Court stated that what is before it does not give it a basis to act. The petition to establish fact of death was denied without prejudice to an alternative procedure.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
